ingredients_text: 25% whole oatmeal, 25% whole barley flakes, 25% whole wheat flakes¹, 15% whole rye flakes¹, 2% rice and wheat petals (rice¹, wheat¹, cane sugar¹, wheat gluten, wheat flour, barley malt extract¹, sea salt, emulsifier: lecithins (sunflower)), 2% flaxseed, 2% puffed amaranth¹, 2% pumpkin seeds¹,  2% sunflower seeds
